conflict_ledger.title: Green Biofuel Policy & Family Ethanol Cartel
conflict_ledger.loophole_explored: Aggressively pushing and drafting national fuel policies—specifically mandating a 20% ethanol blend (E20) in petrol—which directly expands commercial demand and pricing for bio-ethanol producers under the guise of an agricultural and green transition.
conflict_ledger.hidden_connection: His sons (Sarang and Nikhil Gadkari) holding key directorships and substantial equity in the Purti Group (Purti Power & Sugar) and Manas Agro Industries, Vidarbha's dominant sugar, distillery, and ethanol-manufacturing conglomerates.
conflict_ledger.policy_nexus: Manifesto and ministerial programs establishing mandatory green biofuel purchase guidelines, directly multiplying the corporate revenues of family-held agro-distillery cartels.
